title: oziroe biflora
intro: Oziroe biflora, also known as the two-flowered oziroe, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Colchicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oziroe biflora include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Oziroe biflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
